error.signature: grpc._channel._InactiveRpcError: StatusCode.FAILED_PRECONDITION: Operation rejected, system is not in required state

verdict.summary: Server rejected the operation because a required precondition was not met. Wrong system state, missing setup step, or ordering violation.

dead_ends.action: Retry the same RPC without changing state
dead_ends.why_fails: FAILED_PRECONDITION means state must change before the operation can succeed. Blind retry hits the same error.

dead_ends.action: Ignore the error and continue with next operation
dead_ends.why_fails: Operations often have ordering dependencies. Skipping a failed precondition may cause cascading failures.

workarounds.action: Read the error details to determine which precondition failed
workarounds.how: Check status.details() or trailing metadata for specific precondition information from the server

workarounds.action: Ensure required setup or ordering steps are completed first
workarounds.how: Common causes: resource not initialized, wrong lifecycle state, missing prior API call

workarounds.action: Implement a state machine on the client to track valid operation ordering
